◆ The Dashboard

Your Trading HQ

Everything you need at a glance. Account balance, today's P&L, instrument selector, and quick entry — all in one screen.

◆ Simple By Design

Three Steps to a Real Edge

No complex setup. No subscriptions. Open the file and start building your statistical edge today.

01
Log
After every trade, capture entry, exit, confluences, setup grade, and emotional state. The Quick Entry overlay takes under 60 seconds — on desktop or mobile.
Quick EntryMood TagsFVG Fields
02
Review
EdgeLog surfaces patterns invisble in the moment — your best kill zone, worst emotional state, setups that bleed R. Visual dashboards do the heavy lifting.
HeatmapsR-DistributionPsychology
03
Improve
Cut what bleeds. Double on what works. Track discipline, win rate, and R:R compound in real time. The feedback loop that turns struggling traders into funded traders.
PlaybookGoalsProp Dashboard
